nasb.text: With his mouth the godless man destroys his neighbor, But through knowledge the righteous will be delivered.

esv.text: With his mouth the godless man would destroy his neighbor, but by knowledge the righteous are delivered.

cnv.text: 不敬虔的人用口敗壞鄰舍， 義人卻因知識免受其害。

ccb.text: 不敬虔的张口败坏邻舍， 义人却因知识获得拯救。

csbs.text: 伪善者用口毁掉邻人， 义人却因知识得救。
